RunOutcome.description:
How a lane run ended. ``no-useful-work`` is a first-class outcome — the pre-check that
decides not to burn a session is a success, not a failure (Phase 2 scheduler).
RunOutcome.title: RunOutcome

RunTrigger.description: What woke a lane for a run.
RunTrigger.title: RunTrigger

description:
The record a lane writes back after a run (Phase 2 scheduler; surfaced in the studio).

Keyed by ``lane_id`` + ``started_at`` — a run has no separate id. ``no-useful-work`` is a
legitimate outcome, not a failure, so nothing fails silently (fountainbridge non-negotiable).

ended_at.description: When the run ended; None while in flight.
ended_at.title: Ended At

error_detail.description: Failure detail when outcome is 'error'; None otherwise.
error_detail.title: Error Detail

lane_id.description: The lane this run belongs to.
lane_id.title: Lane Id

summary_md.description: Plain-language markdown summary of the run.
summary_md.title: Summary Md

tickets_touched.description: Ids of tickets this run touched.
tickets_touched.title: Tickets Touched

title: RunReport
